description: Inline text element displaying a staff member's job title within a staff profile or teaser.

stories.name: LongTitle
stories.description: A longer job title as used in research project listings

props.title: Cross Cutting Chief, Strategic Futures on Resource Sustainability (SCRS)

notes: Always rendered as a <span> with class 'jobtitle'. Text content varies per staff member and is always a single prop. Appears inside .stap-teaser and .stap-card components alongside .deptname.
